steps.title: Read the age context
steps.content: The phrase says a safe guess would have placed Mr. French somewhere between forty and fifty. Because the subject is a guess and the context is an age range, placed means judged or estimated.

steps.title: Choose the age meaning
steps.content: A means changed, B means arranged, and C means enlisted; none fits a guess about a person's age. The word is being used to mean that the guess would estimate his age within a range. The answer is D.
